dimension: the Form-A test — sounds single-user, must be per-visitor

prompt: A shared shopping list I can invite my partner to
A collaborative whiteboard people can join
A public guestbook anyone can sign
A photo wall where people comment on posts
A team workspace with channels and roles

A social habit app where anyone can propose a habit, people adopt habits and log daily check-ins, each person picks per habit whether their streak is public or buddy-only, and a leaderboard ranks the public streaks
